title: Sweet Boreal
body:
![enter image description here](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/998210630265872387/1116002888393687061/Logo_copie_2_BETA.png)

[
![Discord Logo](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/835159261562404895/1113368828198527037/midlediscord_logo_copie.png?)
](https://discord.gg/k3fGJwJqzu)

 # Introduction

Discover the magic of Canada thanks to sweet boreal!
Ride a moose or get chased by lumberjacks throwing tree trunks. Make the best maple syrup, heated over a wood fire or explore the fabulous mountains of Canada by looting the sugar shacks.

[![BH_NU_PROMO](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/998210630265872387/1111947255537221673/BH_NU_PROMO.png)](https://bisecthosting.com/wrench)


# Maple Biome


![enter image description here](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/998210630265872387/1115935774387474482/maplle.png)

maple trees generate in a new biome: boreal forests

![enter image description here](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/998210630265872387/1115935773636702288/frosr.png)

Frost ! Frost also generate in this biome. You can use it to decorate on the top of any block !

![enter image description here](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/998210630265872387/1115935775616413716/template_item_copie.png)

Be careful ! the lumberjacks live in tents or sugar shacks and they are not very friendly.

![enter image description here](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/998210630265872387/1115935776736284682/caribou.png)

Moose! Find the moose and tame them with the maple leaf.

# Maple syrup processing


![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/998210630265872387/1115935775222136903/reclotee.png)

The maple sap extraction process takes 10 minutes, be patient!

![enter image description here](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/998210630265872387/1115935774769164348/potcadre_toukour_copie.png)

Here is your recipe book! Craft a campfire pot and cook your ingredients.

[![Discord Link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7d437cbe00c4c4d693900b0e41e3a293a84a31b.png)](https://discord.gg/3AvrppcgG3)
